testcase.name: test_get_admin_notifications

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'notifications': [{'amount': 20000.0, 'created_at': '2026-01-11T10:27:41.709883+00:00', 'id': 'beb17cee-bc65-4d26-89d5-d33c6a63d0b8', 'is_read': False, ...}, {'amount': 3856.52, 'created_at': '2026-01-11T09:35:55.259231+00:00', 'id': '30453879-2f91-4c15-af0e-1401adff77bf', 'is_read': False, ...}, {'amount': 971.72, 'created_at': '2026-01-11T06:55:02.009733+00:00', 'id': 'e877a3d7-0594-402e-a0ea-819d5e6b3e09', 'is_read': False, ...}], 'unread_count': 3}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_29.py:184: in test_get_admin_notifications assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'notifications': [{'amount': 20000.0, 'created_at': '2026-01-11T10:27:41.709883+00:00', 'id': 'beb17cee-bc65-4d26-89d5-d33c6a63d0b8', 'is_read': False, ...}, {'amount': 3856.52, 'created_at': '2026-01-11T09:35:55.259231+00:00', 'id': '30453879-2f91-4c15-af0e-1401adff77bf', 'is_read': False, ...}, {'amount': 971.72, 'created_at': '2026-01-11T06:55:02.009733+00:00', 'id': 'e877a3d7-0594-402e-a0ea-819d5e6b3e09', 'is_read': False, ...}], 'unread_count': 3}, list)
